<!--
Thanks for contributing to agentic-fs! Please read CONTRIBUTING.md if you haven't.
Area labels (core, server, extractors, …) are applied automatically from the files you touch.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do, and why? -->

## Related issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #123. Open an issue first for anything large. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Infrastructure / CI
- [ ] Refactor / chore
- [ ] Breaking change (changes a public contract, API, or wire format)

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch named with a convention prefix (`feat/`, `fix/`, `docs/`, `infra/`, `test/`, `chore/`)
- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] `make lint` and `make test` pass locally
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the change
- [ ] Updated docs (ADRs, `docs/build-progress.md`, README) where relevant
- [ ] Kept package boundaries intact (`afs-core` and `afs-connector-sdk` have no server deps)

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything that needs special attention, trade-offs, follow-ups. -->
